subcodes.first_line: O peerless one! Thy letter was received through him who is the son of a martyr and a martyr himself, bringing forth the spirit of joy and sweet fragrance. Its contents [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بدیعه نامه ات بواسطه جناب شهید ابن شهید رسید و روح و ریحان پدید شد مضمونش
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
